llcFilesWith: DC Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection (DLCP), Corporations Division (Trade Name Registration, Form TN-1)
soleProprietorFilesWith: DC Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection (the same district-wide trade name registration applies to individuals and sole proprietors)
feeBasis: The DLCP fee to register a trade name is $55, and renewal is also $55.
renewalRule: A trade name registration must be renewed by April 1 of the second year after registration or the last renewal; a late renewal is accepted through August 31 of that year with a $55 late fee.
protectionNote: A District trade name may not contain an entity qualifier such as LLC, Corp, or LP; it is a disclosure registration and does not grant an exclusive right to the name.
searchNote: Registered trade names appear in the DLCP CorpOnline business search.
notes: The District of Columbia registers trade names with the Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection (D.C. Code Title 47, ch. 28, subchapter I-C). Both LLCs and sole proprietors register for $55, and the term is an unusually short two years, renewable by April 1 of the second year. A trade name cannot carry an entity qualifier such as LLC, and registration is notice rather than a trademark.

sources.citation: DC Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection
sources.title: Trade Name (Form TN-1, $55, 2-year term)
